title: Clubs & Affinity Groups | The Webb Schools | Private Boarding & Day CA
content:
Clubs & Affinity Groups
Building Mindful Community
Leadership is a cornerstone of the Webb experience. From the moment students arrive, we intentionally weave leadership development into their four-year journey—offering meaningful opportunities to explore diverse leadership styles, gain hands-on experience through mentoring and shadowing, and build essential skills that prepare them to lead with confidence and purpose.
List of 2 items.

Read More
Affinity and DEIB Work Groups
Affinity Family Group
: A group for affiliates/parents/guardians with students in any affinity group. Meets a few times a year for speakers, education, and office updates.
Asian Affinity Group
: A group that cultivates an inclusive, empowering space within the Webb community for students of Asian heritage.
Black Affinity Group
: A group that cultivates an inclusive, empowering space within the Webb community for students of Black and African American heritage.
BIPOC Residential Affinity Group
: Provides a safe and welcoming space for boarders who identify as students of color to share experiences, stories, struggles that are associated with being a boarder.
Read More
Sandy ’27
“My favorite thing about being at Webb is probably the community. Everyone's so unique. If I want to learn how to skateboard, there's always someone who knows how to skateboard in my dorm, or in my friend group. I want to learn how to paint, there's great artists around. It's just so diverse.”
Learn more about Culture & Community at Webb
